ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Albany, Bend) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region, including notable features or boundaries */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region's centroid */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region's centroid */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "boundary" TEXT /* Geographical boundary of the region (WKT format) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year of data collection */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ramp_meter_deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "deployment_proportion" REAL /* Proportion of ramp meters deployed in the region for the year */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of installation */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ramp_meter_deployments_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ramp_meter_deployments_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_management_deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "deployment_proportion" REAL /* Proportion of incident management systems deployed in the region for the year */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of installation */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_management_deployments_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_management_deployments_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_coordination_deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "deployment_proportion" REAL /* Proportion of signal coordination systems deployed in the region for the year */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of installation */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_coordination_deployments_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_coordination_deployments_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_management_deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "deployment_proportion" REAL /* Proportion of access management systems deployed in the region for the year */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of installation */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_management_deployments_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_management_deployments_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "other_freeway_operations_deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "deployment_proportion" REAL /* Proportion of other freeway operations measures deployed in the region for the year */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of installation */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_other_freeway_operations_deployments_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_other_freeway_operations_deployments_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "other_arterial_operations_deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "deployment_proportion" REAL /* Proportion of other arterial operations measures deployed in the region for the year */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of installation */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_other_arterial_operations_deployments_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_other_arterial_operations_deployments_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, engineer, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., average travel time, congestion index) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., minutes, percentage) */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the performance metric (e.g., sensors, manual input) */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of the incident (e.g., accident, road closure) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the incident */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the incident (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the incident in minutes */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact on traffic (e.g., light, heavy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic data record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date of the data collection */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensors, cameras) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the data (e.g., traffic volume, speed) */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the data */,
  "data_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the data (e.g., vehicles per hour, miles per hour) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Specific location where the data was collected */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of traffic (e.g., northbound, southbound) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)
